calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner?S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Jee Young (Grace) Kim; Keker, Van Nest & Peters LLP; 415-391-5400; appearing via Zoom on behalf of petitioner Margery Jaquith Hollister.
Amy Holmen Ovalle; 415-533-7559; respondent in pro per, appearing in person on her own behalf.

Respondent Amy Ovalle contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER MARGERY HOLLISTER'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT is GRANTED. Arbitration Award is confirmed in its entirety.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner?S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-16-2021 Continued To Aug-26-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jee Young Kim, 415.391.5400 for Petitioner Margery Hollister. (Zoom)
Amy Ovalle, 415.533.7559 Respondent in Pro Per.

Argued by Petitioner. Ms. Kim states that she is concerned that the Respondents may sell the property before the new hearing date. The Court states that the extended dates are conditioned on the respondent not sell the property until five days after the hearing date. Ms. Kim may prepare and order and the order maybe recorded.

The Court rules as follows: PETITIONER MARGERY HOLLISTER Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment is continued to August 26, 2021. By no later than August 13, 2021 Respondent shall file a supplemental opposition, if any. By no later than August 19, 2021 petitioner may file a supplemental reply. The Defendants shall not sell the property until five days after the extended hearing date of August 26, 2021. Counsel for the Petitioner to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
